torch_pattern: mean = x.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True); var = ((x - mean) ** 2).mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True); y = (x - mean) / torch.sqrt(var + eps); out = y * gamma + beta  # i.e. torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, [DIM], weight=gamma, bias=beta, eps=eps), finalized from pre-gathered partial stats E[x], E[x^2]
weight_transform: gamma/beta of shape [DIM] are reshaped to [1, 1, DIM // 32, 32] and laid out ROW_MAJOR (one tile-row per 32 elements) before ttnn.as_tensor/from_torch; stats tensor is the all-gathered output of layer_norm_pre_all_gather (per-device [.., 2*32] tile columns holding E[x] and E[x^2])
applicability_notes: Second stage of distributed (tensor-parallel) LayerNorm: layer_norm_pre_all_gather computes local partial sums, all_gather concatenates stats across devices, layer_norm_post_all_gather applies (x - mean) * rsqrt(var + eps) * gamma + beta on the locally-sharded hidden dim. Only fuse when DIM is split across devices.

memory_config.shard_spec_template: WIDTH_SHARDED over compute grid, shard=[BATCH*SEQ, DIM/num_devices/NUM_CORES]

placement_observations.source: test_example: sharded distributed-norm path passing program_config=SHARDED_NORM_PRGM_CFG and memory_config=out_memory_config
test_example: tt_stats passed as stats= kwarg, deallocated immediately after the call (tt_stats.deallocate(True)) indicating transient L1 residency
test_example: ttnn_weight/ttnn_bias persistent parameters passed as weight=/bias= kwargs

placement_observations.size_descriptor: same shard shape as input activation

memory_config.shard_spec_template: inherits input WIDTH_SHARDED spec when inplace, else out_memory_config

placement_observations.source: test_example: dtype=output_df, memory_config=out_memory_config in sharded branch
